raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The budget passed by the Legislature preserves $13 billion in the Rainy Day Fund.",
    "The budget includes key wins for public safety, education, healthcare, economic mobility, and tax relief.",
    "Threats to cut higher education awards and grants impact Californian upward mobility and workforce development.",
    "The proposed budget allocates $100 million to implement Proposition 36, aimed at reducing crime and recidivism through behavioral health services and judicial resources.",
    "The budget provides $110 million for California’s Victims of Crime Act program, which funds services for survivors of violence and trauma.",
    "Assemblymember Patel supported increased funding for California’s public university system to reduce the Governor’s proposed cuts.",
    "The budget raises per-pupil Proposition 98 funding to over $25,000 and includes a 2.3% cost-of-living adjustment for public schools.",
    "The budget allocates expanded funding for food banks and programs aimed at child care access and affordable housing.",
    "The budget funds services through the Homeless Housing Assistance and Prevention (HHAP) program to prevent homelessness.",
    "Patel worked to block proposed cuts to Planned Parenthood and community health clinics to preserve access to reproductive and preventative health care.",
    "The budget preserves funding for In-Home Supportive Services (IHSS) and dental care for low-income Californians.",
    "AB 53 provides tax relief for veterans and the family members of deceased service members."
  ]
}
```
